description: Sets a guided missile target. Does not work for all types of missiles. If the target is dead, it is ignored. The target has to be inside the missile's configured targeting cone for the command to work.
examples:
<sqf>
private _missile = createVehicle ["Missile_AGM_01_F", player modelToWorld [0,0,50], [], 0, "CAN_COLLIDE"];
_missile setDir getDir player;
private _target = createVehicle ["O_APC_Wheeled_02_rcws_v2_F", player modelToWorld [0,300,0], [], 0, "CAN_COLLIDE"];
_target setVehicleTiPars [1, 1, 1];
[_missile, _target] spawn {
	params ["_missile", "_target"];
	sleep 0.1;
	_missile setMissileTarget _target;
};
</sqf>
name: setMissileTarget

Item.desc: valid missile target or [[objNull]] to cancel targeting
Item.name: target

Item.desc: valid missile target or [[objNull]] to cancel targeting
Item.name: target

Item.desc: [[true]] to force target (for example to target countermeasure flare object)
Item.name: force
